models.title: Rhiver Matte Black Shower Head
source_fields:
Upgrade your shower experience with our easy-to-install Rhiver Matte Black Shower Head by Studio Design Collection.

Replacing your existing shower head is a quick and simple DIY project that can be done in less than 20 minutes. Our shower heads offer a wide range of styles and innovations to suit any bathroom decor and personal preferences.

  • With a flow rate of 1.75 GPM (gallons per minute), enjoy a relaxing shower experience in your bathroom haven.
  • Made from durable materials, our shower heads provide a long-lasting upgrade to your bathroom. Experience the difference today!

models.title: Jadyn Matte Black Tub and Shower Combination
source_fields:
The Jadyn Matte Black Tub and Shower Combination Combination offers a contemporary and sophisticated design with its sleek style and rounded curves. The Jayden Matte Black Collection meets WaterSense® criteria to conserve water without sacrificing performance. The Versitech™ shower valve features superior pressure balance technology to prevent scalding, solid brass construction for maximum reliability, and optional back-to-back installation for flexibility. The Jadyn Tub & Shower Combo coordinates perfectly with the collections’ bathroom sink faucets to complete the look.

  • The Versitech™ shower valve features superior pressure balance technology to prevent scalding, solid brass construction for maximum reliability, and optional back-to-back installation for flexibility.
  • WaterSense® ; certified with a 1.75 GPM flow rate that conserves water without sacrificing performance
  • Single function showerhead with powerful, consistent performance
  • Spout Type: Tub Spout; Spout Reach: 5.31”

notes: Model intelligence is a compound workflow: category search, model extraction, spec-document capture, and model-page probing.
Blocked model pages are reported as evidence instead of silently dropping retailer coverage.
